nasb.text: It came about as she was riding on her donkey and coming down by the hidden part of the mountain, that behold, David and his men were coming down toward her; so she met them.

esv.text: And as she rode on the donkey and came down under cover of the mountain, behold, David and his men came down toward her, and she met them.

cnv.text: 亞比該騎著驢，正從山坡下來，忽見大衛和跟隨他的人也正從對面迎著她走下來，亞比該就與他相遇了。

ccb.text: 她骑着驴下山的时候，就看见大卫和他的部下迎面而来。
